items.title: Vintage Victorian-Style Wrought Iron Headboard & Footboard Set
items.description:
While cleaning out a storage locker, I found a Vintage Victorian-Style Wrought Iron Headboard & Footboard Set, which features intricate scrollwork and decorative floral medallions, this set also offers a romantic, airy aesthetic feel, that is increasingly hard to find. The set contains one (1) headboard and one (1) footboard. The size of the headboard is 53” Tall X 53” Wide and the footboard is 38” Tall X 53” Wide. The material is heavy-duty wrought metal/iron with an original distressed white finish. The condition of the set exhibits significant surface wear, paint chipping, and localized oxidation (rust), which would make for a great DYI project. Also, the lot is for the headboard and footboard only. No side rails or frame hardware are included. REFER TO THE PHOTOGRAPHS FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
Pickup category timeslot {A}

items.title: White Marble Rolling Pin & Granite Pastry Board Set
items.description:
While cleaning out a storage locker, I found in a storage box a White Marble Rolling Pin & Granite Pastry Board. The condition of the lot is excellent. Both pieces are naturally durable, moisture-resistant, and provide a sophisticated, classic aesthetic feel to any kitchen. NOTE: Marble and granite are preferred by professional pastry chefs, because they stay cooler than room temperature, preventing the butter in your dough from melting while you work. This set would be an excellent addition to someone’s kitchen supplies. REFER TO THE PHOTOGRAPHS FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
Pickup category timeslot {A}

items.title: Pearl Necklace with carrying Case
items.description:
During a storage locker clean out. I found in a cardboard box this Pearl Necklace with Carrying Case. The display tray does not come with the pearls, but the bag comes with the pearls. The pearls appear to be in very good vintage condition. The strand is smoothly strung and appears to be knotted. Since I am not an appraiser or collector, I am not able to determine the pearl type. But these pearls seem to possess a cream body color with good luster and a soft, iridescent glow. The pearls show no visible or a very minor surface blemish. This item would be an excellent addition to someone’s wardrobe. REFER TO THE PHOTOGRAPHS FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
Pickup category timeslot {A}

items.title: Vintage M. Hohner Harmonica Set | Marine Band 1896 & Large Full Concert Model | Made in Germany.
items.description:
For your consideration is a beautiful set of two authentic, Vintage M. Hohner Harmonica Set  Marine Band 1896 & Large Full Concert Model  Made in Germany, which were in a storage locker clean out, both instruments are "Made in Germany" and come in their original era-appropriate cardboard boxes. The boxes exhibit normal age and wear. These are highly collectible pieces that embody the traditional craftsmanship Hohner is world-renowned for.  The materials that make these harmonicas collectable is Pearwood combs, brass reed plates, and stainless steel/nickel-plated covers. I did not test the instruments, therefore, they will be "As-Is". While they appear well-maintained, they have not been professionally cleaned or tuned. REFER TO THE PHOTOGRAPHS FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
Pickup category timeslot {A}
